expo.name: Slatt
expo.description: slatt is collective intelligence that grows smarter as people teach it. Ask questions, get verified answers, and contribute what you know — fact-checked or from real personal experience.

plugins.photosPermission: slatt uses your photo library so you can share knowledge with images.
plugins.cameraPermission: slatt uses your camera so you can capture and share knowledge.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow slatt to save images to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow slatt to save images to your photo library.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow slatt to use Face ID to confirm your identity when deleting your account.
